meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't scale projects. A Advanced-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Scale Freelance Development Fast
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale. Master Claude Code skills setup with Antigravity to automate your workflow, ship faster, and double your freelance project capacity.
content.answer_block: To scale as a freelancer, you must move from manual coding to AI-orchestrated development. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into a high-velocity engine. This setup automates repetitive boilerplate, manages complex refactoring, and ensures production-ready code output, allowing you to handle three times the client volume.
content.intro:
The midnight oil is burning, yet your project backlog remains stagnant. You are trapped in the 'manual labor' bottleneck, where every feature add requires hours of tedious syntax wrestling. As a freelancer, your time is your inventory; when you spend it on boilerplate, your profit margin evaporates.

But the paradigm has shifted. By leveraging Claude Code and Antigravity, you stop being a code-writer and start being an architect. This guide reveals the professional workflow used by elite AI builders to automate the mundane, crush complexity, and deliver high-value SaaS products with surgical precision.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Configure your project workspace to allow Claude Code to index your codebase effectively, ensuring context-awareness for every command.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory structure and suggest an optimal .claudeignore configuration to exclude build artifacts and sensitive keys.

steps.title: Automated Architectural Planning
steps.description: Use Antigravity to define your project roadmap, then feed that structure into Claude Code to maintain architectural integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular folder structure for a multi-tenant SaaS application using Next.js and Supabase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Implement the directory structure defined in the architectural plan'

steps.title: Boilerplate Injection
steps.description: Stop writing auth and database schemas from scratch. Use Claude Code to inject battle-tested patterns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a standardized TypeScript interface for user authentication and role-based access control.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create auth middleware using the generated interface'

steps.title: Recursive Debugging Loops
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code’s ability to read error logs and self-correct, saving you from hours of stack-overflow searching.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the latest error logs in /logs and identify the root cause of the database connection timeout.

steps.title: Production Deployment Sync
steps.description: Automate final code reviews and documentation generation to ensure your client receives polished, maintainable code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate technical documentation for the new API endpoints added in this sprint.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Update README.md with new API specs and run final test suite'

pro_tips: Always use a dedicated 'scratchpad' file in your repo for Claude to track state during complex, multi-day refactors.
Alias your most frequent Claude Code commands in your shell profile to save hundreds of keystrokes per session.
Use Antigravity to generate 'Persona Prompts' that force Claude to adopt a specific engineering style, such as 'clean code' or 'performance-first'.
Run 'claude diff' before committing to maintain a human-in-the-loop review process for critical security logic.
Periodically clear the Claude Code context cache to ensure the AI doesn't get stuck on stale architectural assumptions.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is configured, start by automating your next project's boilerplate. Then, audit your workflow to identify the most time-consuming task you perform weekly and assign that task to Claude Code via a custom Antigravity prompt.
content.conversion_block: Stop trading your hours for dollars and start scaling your output with the same tools top 1% engineers use. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
